errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.check_connection: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
errors.failed_to_save: Could not save your changes. Please try again.
errors.not_found: We could not find what you were looking for.
errors.invalid_token: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.otp_invalid: That code is incorrect. Check your email or tap Resend for a new code.
errors.otp_expired: This code has expired. Tap Resend to get a new one.
errors.otp_too_many_attempts: Too many wrong attempts. Tap Resend to get a new code.
errors.otp_resend_cooldown: Please wait a moment before requesting a new code.
errors.email_not_verified: Verify your email with the code we sent before continuing.
errors.email_send_failed: We could not send the verification email. Please try again later.
errors.network_timeout: The request timed out. Check your connection and try again.
errors.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.otp_length: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.
errors.firebase_signin_failed: Sign-in failed after verification. Please try again.
errors.load_failed: Could not load data. Pull to refresh or tap Retry.

auth.code_resent: A new code was sent. Previous codes no longer work.
